name.es: Pan de masa madre con harina de alta extracción
name.fr: Pain au levain à la farine à haute extraction

description.en: Built entirely on a single high-extraction flour, milled with more bran and germ than white flour but less than full whole wheat. The result: a glossy, custard-like crumb, toasted-grain flavor and a genuinely crackling crust.
description.de: Vollständig aus einem einzigen hochausgemahlenen Mehl gebacken, das mehr Kleie und Keim als Weißmehl enthält, aber weniger als reines Vollkornmehl. Das Ergebnis: eine glänzende, cremige Krume, gerösteter Getreidegeschmack und eine wirklich krachende Kruste.
description.es: Elaborado por completo con una única harina de alta extracción, con más salvado y germen que la harina blanca pero menos que el trigo integral puro. El resultado: una miga brillante y cremosa, sabor a grano tostado y una corteza verdaderamente crujiente.
description.fr: Construit entièrement sur une seule farine à haute extraction, avec plus de son et de germe que la farine blanche mais moins qu'un blé complet intégral. Le résultat: une mie brillante et onctueuse, un goût de grain torréfié et une croûte vraiment craquante.

origin.note: Built around Cairnspring Mills' stone-milled Trailblazer flour from Washington State; part of the broader high-extraction-flour movement in contemporary American artisan baking.

ingredients.note: single high-extraction (Type 85-style) flour, e.g. Cairnspring Trailblazer

method.title: Build the levain
method.summary: Mix starter with the high-extraction flour and water; ripen about 5 hours.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the remaining flour and water; rest 1.5 hours.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Add the levain, remaining water and salt; develop through slap-and-fold or bowl folds until smooth.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Ferment about 4 hours with six sequential stretch-and-fold sets.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide, preshape into tight rounds, bench-rest 35 minutes, then final-shape as boule or bâtard.

method.title: Cold proof
method.summary: Proof in sealed baskets in the refrigerator overnight, about 18 hours.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered, then 30-35 minutes uncovered until the internal temperature reaches 96-98°C.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest at least an hour before slicing.

source.author: Maurizio Leo, from 'The Perfect Loaf' (2022)
source.adaptation: High-extraction flour modeled as a 60/40 white/whole-wheat blend for the formula's type breakdown, since no exact taxonomy match exists for it.
